title: pyrus sandakphuensis
intro: Pyrus sandakphuensis, also known as the Sandakphu apple, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae) that is native to the Himalayas. The medicinal properties of Pyrus sandakphuensis include its antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to treat various health issues, such as fever, cough, and digestive problems, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Pyrus sandakphuensis typically involve its leaves and fruits, which are used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties.
